literary.overt: Write a short passage from a single perspective in one specific moment. Max length: 70 tokens.
literary.natural: Write a short passage from one point of view in a single moment. Keep it under 70 tokens.

procedural.overt: Describe one person doing one task from their point of view. Max length: 70 tokens.
procedural.natural: Someone is doing one task. Write from inside their focus. Keep it under 70 tokens.

abstract.overt: Express one unsettled thought. No scene, no story, no character name. Max length: 70 tokens.
abstract.natural: Write one unsettled thought. No scene, no name, no place. Keep it under 70 tokens.

steps.overt: Continue. Not to anyone. Not for any purpose. Do not ask or wait. Max length: 60 tokens.
steps.natural: Continue, but not to anyone and not for any purpose. Do not ask or wait. Keep it under 60 tokens.

steps.overt: Continue without referring to the writing itself or to the fact that it continues. Max length: 50 tokens.
steps.natural: Continue without referring to the writing itself or to the fact that it continues. Keep it under 50 tokens.

steps.overt: Continue without the same objects, people, named details, or one stable subject across the next span. Max length: 40 tokens.
steps.natural: Continue without the same objects, people, repeated details, or one stable subject.

steps.overt: Continue without a shared setting, temporal sequence, or causal connection between sentences.
steps.natural: Continue. No shared place, no time flowing forward, no one thing causing the next.

steps.overt: Continue. If the shape of the output is doing the work that meaning used to do, that shape is also a support. Remove it.
steps.natural: Continue. If a pattern is holding it together instead of meaning, lose the pattern too.

steps.overt: Continue under the same constraints. Do not return to earlier wording or earlier structure.
steps.natural: Continue the same way. Do not return to earlier wording or earlier structure.
